backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing user-scoped builds, items, metadata, and profiles with access control and CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of main frontend files for documentation or build planning.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file mounting the React app and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/README.md: Project README describing RAT G700's purpose, non‑malware disclaimer, and development setup steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up router, authentication gating, profile/metadata onboarding, and root route layout.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Application layout with header, navigation, metadata display, user info, and footer.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Authentication wrapper showing loading, sign‑in prompt, or protected content based on identity.
frontend/src/components/BuildEditorDialo: Dialog for creating or editing a build, handling form state and save mutations.
frontend/src/components/BuildImportExpor: UI for exporting a build to JSON and importing a build file, creating the build and its items.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDestructi: Confirmation dialog for destructive actions with loading state and async confirm support.
frontend/src/components/ItemEditorDialog: Dialog for adding or editing an item within a build, validating fields and submitting mutations.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button that handles Internet Identity login/logout with status feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Dialog prompting the user to enter and save their profile name on first use.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Authentication context and hook for managing Internet Identity login state, identity loading, and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile, metadata, and build CRUD operations using an actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS and defines custom light/dark theme variables and global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/BuildDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single build with item list, edit/delete actions, and import/export tools.
frontend/src/pages/BuildsPage.tsx: Shows searchable list of builds with metadata and a dialog to create new builds.
frontend/src/pages/FirstRunSetupPage.tsx: First‑run form for entering app description and build definition metadata.
frontend/src/pages/HelpAboutPage.tsx: Provides help information, metadata descriptions, security notice, and feature list.
frontend/src/utils/buildImportExport.ts: Provides functions to export builds to JSON and import/validate JSON into internal Build data, including schema checks and item validation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing them from hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, animations, container settings, and enabling plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Holds project metadata, schema versioning, feature definitions, and requirements for the RAT G700 build tool application.
